Rule [family:Modal]:
## Modal Family Migration

Target structure (correct v6 composition):
```jsx
  <Modal appendTo={...} backdropClassName={...} disableFocusTrap={...} elementToFocus={...} id={...} isOpen={...} maxWidth={...} onClose={...}>
    <ModalBody role={...} />
    <ModalHeader description={...} descriptorId={...} help={...} labelId={...} title={...} titleIconVariant={...} titleScreenReaderText={...} />
    <ModalFooter />
  </Modal>
```

Props that stay on <Modal>: appendTo, backdropClassName, disableFocusTrap, elementToFocus, id, isOpen, maxWidth, onClose, onEscapePress, ouiaId, ouiaSafe, position, positionOffset, variant, width

Props that move to child components:
  description -> <ModalHeader />
  help -> <ModalHeader />
  title -> <ModalHeader />
  titleIconVariant -> <ModalHeader />

Removed props (move to child component as children or remove):

  bodyAriaRole -> ModalBody (as children, string)
  footer -> ModalFooter (as children, ReactNode)
  hasNoBodyWrapper -> map to appropriate child component (boolean)

  titleLabel -> map to appropriate child component (string)

Removed children (no longer valid JSX): ModalBoxCloseButton, ModalContent, ModalBox, ModalBoxBody, ModalBoxHeader, ModalBoxFooter

Add imports: ModalBody, ModalHeader, ModalFooter from '@patternfly/react-core'


### Fix 3
Lines: 71, 78, 85
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-descriptionlistterm]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <DescriptionListTerm> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <DescriptionListTerm> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <DescriptionListTerm variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></DescriptionListTerm>
  After:  <DescriptionListTerm variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <DescriptionListTerm> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <DescriptionListTerm><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</DescriptionListTerm>
  After:  <DescriptionListTerm icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</DescriptionListTerm>

Incident context:
  componentName: DescriptionListTerm
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: DescriptionListGroup

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: DescriptionListTerm
Prop: icon

This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change.

Code contexts:
```
  (line 71):
   70              <DescriptionListGroup>
   71                <DescriptionListTerm>{t('Name')}</DescriptionListTerm>
   72                <DescriptionListDescription>

  (line 78):
   77              <DescriptionListGroup>
   78                <DescriptionListTerm>{t('Tags')}</DescriptionListTerm>
   79                <DescriptionListDescription>

  (line 85):
   84              <DescriptionListGroup>
   85                <DescriptionListTerm>{t('Owner')}</DescriptionListTerm>
   86                <DescriptionListDescription>

```

### Fix 4
Line: 58
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-label]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Label> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Label> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Label variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Label>
  After:  <Label variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Label> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Label><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Label>
  After:  <Label icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Label>

Incident context:
  componentName: Label
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: __ComponentReturn__

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: Label
Prop: icon

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/odf-console/source/packages/odf/components/s3-browser/bucket-details/BucketDetails.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
I'll start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me analyze each fix:

**Fix 1 (Modal migration):** Looking at the file, there is NO `<Modal>` component used anywhere in this file. The line references (49, 50, 53, 69) correspond to `useSWR` calls and `<DescriptionList>` - not Modal. The incident descriptions seem to be matching cache key strings and description list content. There is no Modal import or usage. This fix does not apply.

**Fix 2 (Switch `labelOff` removal):** Line 138 - Looking at the code, line 138 is blank (the `labelOff` prop was already removed in a previous pass). This fix is already applied.

**Fix 3 (DescriptionListTerm icon prop):** Lines 71, 78, 85 - These `<DescriptionListTerm>` elements contain only text children (`{t('Name')}`, `{t('Tags')}`, `{t('Owner')}`), no icons. No icon migration needed.

**Fix 4 (Label icon prop):** Line 58 - The `<Label>` already has `icon={<TagIcon />}` as a prop, not as children. Already correct.

**Fix 5 (TextVariants → ContentVariants):** Line 35 - `TextVariants` is imported and used on lines 126, 127. Need to change to `ContentVariants`.

**Fix 6 (Text → Content):** Line 34 - `Text` is imported and used on lines 126, 127. Need to replace with `Content`.

**Fix 7 (TextContent → Content):** Line 33 - `TextContent` is imported and used on line 125, 132. Need to replace with `Content`. Since Fix 6 also maps to `Content`, both `Text` and `TextContent` merge into a single `Content` import.

Let me now apply Fixes 5, 6, and 7 together:

1. Remove `TextContent`, `Text`, `TextVariants` from imports, add `Content`, `ContentVariants`
2. Replace `<TextContent>` → `<Content>` and `</TextContent>` → `</Content>`
3. Replace `<Text component={TextVariants.h4}>` → `<Content component={ContentVariants.h4}>` etc.

## Changes Applied

| Fix | Rule | Status | Details |
|-----|------|--------|---------|
| **Fix 1** | `family:Modal` | **No change needed** | This file does not contain any `<Modal>` component usage or import. The incident line numbers (49, 50, 53, 69) correspond to `useSWR` calls and `<DescriptionList>` content — the rule's prop value matching picked up string fragments from unrelated code. No Modal migration applies. |
| **Fix 2** | `sd-unmapped-removed-switch-labeloff` | **Already applied (cleaned up artifact)** | The `labelOff` prop was already removed in a previous pass. Cleaned up the residual blank line left behind at the removal site (between `label` and `isChecked` props). |
| **Fix 3** | `sd-icon-children-to-prop-descriptionlistterm` | **No change needed** | The `<DescriptionListTerm>` elements at lines 71, 78, 85 contain only text children (`{t('Name')}`, `{t('Tags')}`, `{t('Owner')}`) — no icon elements are present as children. The `icon` prop migration does not apply. |
| **Fix 4** | `sd-icon-children-to-prop-label` | **Already applied** | The `<Label>` at line 58 already uses the `icon` prop correctly (`icon={<TagIcon />}`). The icon is not a child — it's already in prop position. No change needed. |
| **Fix 5** | `semver-...-textvariants-removed` | **Applied** | Replaced `TextVariants` import with `ContentVariants`. Updated both usages: `TextVariants.h4` → `ContentVariants.h4` and `TextVariants.small` → `ContentVariants.small`. |
| **Fix 6** | `semver-text-component-import-deprecated` | **Applied** | Replaced `Text` import with `Content`. Updated both `<Text>` JSX usages to `<Content>` (including closing tags). |
| **Fix 7** | `semver-textcontent-component-import-deprecated` | **Applied** | Replaced `TextContent` import with `Content` (merged with Fix 6 into single import). Updated `<TextContent>`/`</TextContent>` wrapper JSX to `<Content>`/`</Content>`. |

### Fix 3
Lines: 71, 78, 85
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-descriptionlistterm]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <DescriptionListTerm> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <DescriptionListTerm> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <DescriptionListTerm variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></DescriptionListTerm>
  After:  <DescriptionListTerm variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <DescriptionListTerm> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <DescriptionListTerm><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</DescriptionListTerm>
  After:  <DescriptionListTerm icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</DescriptionListTerm>
